instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the ground slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, with your feet elevated on a stable surface.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core muscles.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell decline hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to chest height and attach the handles.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step forward to create tension in the cables.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and engage your core.
Step:5 Bend your elbows and bring your hands to shoulder level, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:6 Push the handles forward, extending your arms fully in front of you.
Step:7 Pause for a moment, then slowly reverse the movement, bringing your hands back to shoulder level.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Step:2 Lie flat on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:3 Grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell pullover hip extension on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 While keeping your arms extended, lift your hips off the ground, squeezing your glutes and engaging your core.
Step:7 Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: resistance band seated chest press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band handles in each hand, with your palms facing down and elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your arms forward, pushing the resistance band away from your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back and position yourself with a slight bend in your knees.
Step:5 Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Lower the bar towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up (wall)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells upward, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push up on bosu ball
instructions: Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Step:2 Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and cable handles to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back straight and feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip at shoulder height.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell one arm floor press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet and your arm extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Slowly lower the kettlebell towards your chest by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the kettlebell is just above your chest, then push it back up to the starting position by extending your elbow.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: smith incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:3 Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable incline fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: deep push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hands bike
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and handlebar position to a comfortable level.
Step:2 Sit on the ergometer with your back straight and feet on the pedals.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your hands and position your arms at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Start pedaling with your hands, pushing and pulling the handles in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

name: drop push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell guillotine bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell slowly towards your neck, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your neck.
Step:5 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: clock push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center.
Step:5 Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides with each repetition.

name: band bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the band handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, pushing the bands away from your chest.
Step:4 Slowly lower the bands back down to your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and position it at shoulder height, with your elbow bent and palm facing forward.
Step:3 Slowly press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended, while keeping your core engaged and maintaining balance on the exercise ball.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: weighted straight bar dip
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm reverse grip press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: dumbbell around pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever standing chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: archer push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, extending the opposite arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline one arm fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: superman push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower your body, simultaneously lift your right arm and left leg off the ground, extending them straight out.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your arm and leg back down while pushing yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time lifting your left arm and right leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable low fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Maintaining control, slowly bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion, crossing them in front of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, feeling the stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:6 Reverse the motion and slowly return your arms to the starting position, keeping tension on your chest muscles throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys.
Step:3 Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them to shoulder height.
Step:5 Push the handles forward and upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable one arm incline fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back against an incline bench.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbow, slowly lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: floor fly (with barbell)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until your arms are parallel to the floor, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: modified hindu push-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground, bending your elbows and keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 As you lower your body, shift your weight back and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, creating an inverted V shape with your body.
Step:4 Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground, then reverse the movement, pushing your hips back down and extending your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: medicine ball chest push with run release
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot and simultaneously push the medicine ball forward, extending your arms fully.
Step:3 As you push the ball forward, release it and let it roll forward.
Step:4 Quickly run forward and catch the ball before it hits the ground.
Step:5 Once you catch the ball, bring it back to your chest and repeat the movement with your left foot forward.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs and repeating the exercise for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline palm-in press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Plant your feet firmly on the ground and keep your back straight against the bench.
Step:4 Start with the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and palms facing each other.
Step:5 Press the dumbbells up and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying pullover on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the ball.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: incline push-up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: medicine ball chest pass
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest with force.
Step:3 As you release the ball, follow through with your arms and torso, transferring your weight from your back foot to your front foot.
Step:4 Catch the ball as it rebounds off the wall or partner, and immediately repeat the movement.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying one arm press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder level with your palm facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: push-up plus
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, push through your hands to extend your arms and lift your upper body up.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, protract your shoulder blades by pushing your upper back towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement by retracting your shoulder blades and lowering your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable one arm incline press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back resting against an incline bench.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at a 90-degree angle with your elbow bent.
Step:3 Press the cable handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: cable upper chest crossovers
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the cables together in front of your chest, crossing them over each other.
Step:6 Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the cables back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables.
Step:5 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 With a slight bend in your elbows, slowly bring your arms forward and together in front of your chest.
Step:7 Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Step:8 Slowly reverse the movement, returning your arms to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: wide hand push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith wide grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith incline reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine to a comfortable incline angle.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip that is slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: shoulder tap push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you push back up, lift your right hand off the ground and tap your left shoulder.
Step:4 Return your right hand to the ground and repeat the push-up, this time lifting your left hand and tapping your right shoulder.
Step:5 Continue alternating shoulder taps with each push-up repetition.
Step:6 Maintain a stable core and avoid excessive hip rotation throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable one arm press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at chest height, elbow bent.
Step:3 Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Step:4 Press the cable handle forward, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dynamic chest stretch (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly bring your arms forward, crossing them in front of your body.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 10-30 seconds.
Step:6 Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: behind head chest stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Interlace your fingers behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Slowly squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat as desired.

name: medicine ball chest push multiple response
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith decline reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline fly
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm chest fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your upper back is supported on the ball and your head, neck, and shoulders are off the ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inward.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: hyght dumbbell fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith machine reverse decline close grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell straight arm pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc-like motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: chest tap push-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, tap your chest with your right hand.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time tapping your chest with your left hand.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable one arm fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Slowly bring your arm across your body, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: cable cross-over variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable pulleys to chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:4 Take a step forward, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:5 With a slight bend in your elbows, bring your hands together in front of your chest.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm reverse fly (with support)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards.
Step:3 Lean forward and place your free hand on the bench for support.
Step:4 Keep your arm slightly bent and raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: weighted front raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell one arm push press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead by extending your arm and fully extending your legs.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and bringing the kettlebell back to your shoulder.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: barbell seated overhead press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing front raise above head
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell standing wide military press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Step:2 Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly in front of the bar.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated reverse fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell rear delt row_shoulder
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Raise the dumbbells out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated reverse fly (parallel grip)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell skier
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Simultaneously lift the barbell up towards your shoulders while jumping slightly off the ground.
Step:4 As you reach the top of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith behind neck press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:5 Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward.
Step:6 Press the bar up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell rear delt raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm shoulder press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the dumbbell straight up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: standing behind neck press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing rear delt row (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable attachment with both hands, palms facing each other, and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell anti gravity press
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell thruster
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead.
Step:4 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: resistance band seated shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level.
Step:3 Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying one arm rear lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, hanging towards the floor.
Step:2 Keep your arm straight and lift the dumbbell out to the side, away from your body.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: dumbbell alternate side press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height.
Step:3 Lower the pressed dumbbell back to shoulder height while pressing the other dumbbell overhead.
Step:4 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inverted style smith seated shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level. Maintain inverted form throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable kneeling rear delt row (with rope) (male) expanded
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low cable pulley and kneel down facing the machine.
Step:2 (expanded variation) Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, pull the rope towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades.
Step:4 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement and hold for a brief pause.
Step:5 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever military press with strength
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 (strength variation) Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell iron cross - improved variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, forming a T shape with your body. Perform with improved intensity.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: resistance band seated shoulder press with declined
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level.
Step:3 Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level. Emphasize declined control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: core barbell upright row v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Perform with core intensity.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: prone dumbbell upright shoulder external rotation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Emphasize prone control.
Step:3 Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: single smith shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 (single variation) Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: athletic style battling ropes
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 (athletic variation) Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm.
Step:5 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell arnold press - beginner variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms. Emphasize beginner control.
Step:3 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell seated press with high
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Focus on high movement.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: tough cable one arm lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Focus on tough movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: horizontal dumbbell standing alternate overhead press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 (horizontal variation) Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: stationary bike run
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Step:3 Start pedaling at a comfortable pace.
Step:4 Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance as desired.
Step:5 Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and proper posture.
Step:6 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the resistance and slow down before coming to a complete stop.
Step:8 Stretch your legs and cool down after the workout.

name: astride jumps (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Step:3 Jump explosively upwards, extending your legs and arms.
Step:4 While in the air, spread your legs apart and bring your arms out to the sides.
Step:5 Land softly with your feet shoulder-width apart, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: run
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed.
Step:3 Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance.
Step:5 Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.

name: short stride run
instructions: Step:1 Find an open space or a treadmill to perform the exercise.
Step:2 Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:3 Start jogging in place, lifting your knees high and pumping your arms.
Step:4 After a few seconds, start taking short strides forward, maintaining a quick pace.
Step:5 Continue running with short strides for the desired duration or distance.

name: ski step
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Jump to the right, landing on your right foot while swinging your left leg behind your right leg.
Step:4 Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot while swinging your right leg behind your left leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating jumps from side to side, mimicking a skiing motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: run (equipment)
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed.
Step:3 Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance.
Step:5 Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.

name: swing 360
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Engage your core and swing your arms in a circular motion, rotating your torso as you do so.
Step:4 Continue the circular motion, swinging your arms and rotating your torso for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:5 Remember to breathe throughout the exercise.

name: push to run
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:3 Push through your hands to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Quickly bring one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring the other knee towards your chest.
Step:5 Continue alternating knees as fast as you can while maintaining good form.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

name: semi squat jump (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Step:3 Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees while swinging your arms for momentum.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: walking on stepmill
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the stepmill machine to a comfortable level.
Step:2 Step onto the machine and place your hands on the handrails for support.
Step:3 Start walking by placing one foot on a step and then the other, alternating between legs.
Step:4 Maintain an upright posture and engage your core muscles.
Step:5 Continue walking for the desired duration or distance.
Step:6 Gradually increase the intensity or speed as you become more comfortable with the exercise.
Step:7 Remember to cool down and stretch after completing the exercise.

name: skater hops
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and jump to the right, landing on your right foot.
Step:3 As you land, swing your left leg behind your right leg and tap the ground with your left toes.
Step:4 Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot.
Step:5 As you land, swing your right leg behind your left leg and tap the ground with your right toes.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides, jumping and tapping the ground with each leg.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: jack burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, placing your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back, landing in a push-up position.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, lowering your chest to the ground and then pushing back up.
Step:5 Jump your feet forward, landing in a squat position.
Step:6 Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Step:7 Land softly and immediately lower back into the squat position to begin the next repetition.

name: high knee against wall
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your right knee up towards your chest, while keeping your left foot on the ground.
Step:4 Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee up towards your chest and lowering your right foot back down.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs in a running motion, bringing your knees up as high as possible.
Step:6 Maintain a fast pace and keep your upper body stable throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

name: walking on incline treadmill
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline level on the treadmill to your desired intensity.
Step:2 Stand on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Start walking at a comfortable pace, ensuring that you maintain proper form.
Step:4 Engage your core muscles and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Continue walking on the incline treadmill for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:6 Gradually decrease the incline and speed of the treadmill to cool down before stopping.

name: mountain climber
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and bring your right knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring your left knee towards your chest.
Step:3 Continue alternating legs in a running motion, keeping your hips low and your core engaged.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and breathe evenly throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and placing your hands on the floor in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back into a push-up position.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Jump your feet back into the squat position.
Step:6 Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Step:7 Land softly and immediately lower back into a squat position to begin the next repetition.

name: scissor jumps (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Jump off the ground and simultaneously cross your right leg in front of your left leg.
Step:3 As you land, quickly switch legs, crossing your left leg in front of your right leg.
Step:4 Continue alternating legs and jumping as quickly as possible.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: jump rope
instructions: Step:1 Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again.
Step:5 Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

name: bear crawl
instructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired distance or time.

name: wheel run
instructions: Step:1 Start in a plank position with your hands on the wheel and your body straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and start rolling the wheel forward by extending your arms.
Step:3 Continue rolling until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:4 Reverse the movement by pulling the wheel back towards your body, using your core and arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: jack jump (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet together and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Jump up, spreading your feet apart and raising your arms above your head.
Step:3 As you land, quickly jump back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cycle cross trainer
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the cycle cross trainer.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and grip the handlebars.
Step:3 Start pedaling in a smooth and controlled motion.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and increase the resistance if desired.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.

name: dumbbell burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart and a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, placing the dumbbells on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back into a push-up position, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, bending your elbows and lowering your chest towards the ground.
Step:5 Jump your feet back towards your hands, landing in a squat position.
Step:6 Stand up explosively, lifting the dumbbells off the ground and bringing them to your shoulders.
Step:7 Press the dumbbells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Lower the dumbbells back to your shoulders and repeat the entire sequence for the desired number of repetitions.

name: half knee bends (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: back and forth step
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot, bending your knee and lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Push off with your right foot and step back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat the movement with your left foot, alternating legs with each step.
Step:5 Continue stepping back and forth, maintaining a steady pace.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.

name: stationary bike walk
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position on the stationary bike to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Step:3 Start pedaling at a comfortable pace, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance level if desired.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:6 Cool down by gradually reducing your pace and resistance level.
Step:7 Stretch your leg muscles after the workout to prevent tightness and promote recovery.

name: walk elliptical cross trainer
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

name: star jump (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and jump up explosively.
Step:3 As you jump, spread your legs and extend your arms out to the sides, forming a star shape with your body.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet with your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: walking high knees lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Lift your right knee up towards your chest as high as you can while balancing on your left leg.
Step:3 Step forward with your right foot and lower your body into a lunge position, bending both knees to a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and bring your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:5 Step forward with your left foot and lower your body into a lunge position.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs and lunging forward, keeping your core engaged and maintaining a steady pace.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: half knee bends (male) with blunt
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair. Emphasize blunt control.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: alternating bear crawl
instructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 (alternating variation) Continue for the desired distance or time.

name: pulse style walk elliptical cross trainer
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise. Emphasize pulse control.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

name: walk elliptical cross trainer - expanded variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step:2 Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Step:3 Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Step:4 Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion. Emphasize expanded control.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:7 Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.

name: lever rotary calf
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet, raising your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - palm up
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place it on top of your thigh, palm facing up.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground and extend it in front of you, keeping your knee slightly bent.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: barbell standing rocking leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, balancing on the balls of your feet.
Step:3 Slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell seated calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step.
Step:3 Lower your heels as far as possible, feeling a stretch in your calves.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, contracting your calves.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: seated calf stretch (male)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your calf muscle.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

name: barbell standing calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using only your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell floor calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Place a barbell on the floor in front of you.
Step:2 Stand with the balls of your feet on the edge of the barbell, with your heels hanging off.
Step:3 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, using your calves to lift your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted donkey calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand on a raised platform with your toes on the edge and your heels hanging off.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for support.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band two legs calf raise - (band under both legs) v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a resistance band under both feet.
Step:2 Hold the ends of the band with your hands for stability.
Step:3 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hack one leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand on the sled machine with one foot, keeping the other foot off the ground.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up on the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch legs and repeat the exercise.

name: lever calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leverage machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Step:2 Place your toes on the lever pad, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or side supports for stability.
Step:4 Push the lever pad down by extending your ankles, contracting your calf muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by allowing your heels to rise back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: sled forward angled calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself on the machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the machine for support.
Step:3 Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels as high as possible, pushing against the resistance of the sled.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: peroneals stretch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Step:3 Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the tension on the rope and repeat the stretch on the other leg.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: sled calf press on leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the sled, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Release the safety handles and push the sled away from you by extending your knees and ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the sled back down by bending your knees and ankles.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith seated one leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footrest.
Step:2 Place one leg on the footrest and keep the other leg off the footrest.
Step:3 Using your calf muscles, raise your heel as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - hammer grip
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
