Step:2 Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle.
Step:4 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: sled one leg calf press on leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off.
Step:4 Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: calf stretch with rope
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall or sturdy object with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the ends of the rope in each hand and place the middle of the rope around the ball of your right foot.
Step:3 Step back with your left foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, keeping your back straight, and gently pull on the rope to stretch your calf.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:6 Repeat on the other leg.

name: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between knees)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your knees.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: standing calf raise (on a staircase)
instructions: Step:1 Stand on the edge of a step or a sturdy platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step.
Step:2 Hold onto a railing or wall for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: posterior tibialis stretch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Step:3 Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the tension on the rope and relax your foot.
Step:6 Repeat the stretch on the other leg.

name: hack calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Step:2 Stand on the sled machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible by pushing through the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell single leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand on the edge of a step or platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on a wall or railing for support.
Step:3 Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down below the step.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: band single leg reverse calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your foot.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: lever seated calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell standing leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles.
Step:3 Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: sled lying calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the platform.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the edge of the platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Push the platform away from you by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Continue pushing until your calves are fully contracted.
Step:6 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the platform back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between ankles)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your ankles.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: exercise ball on the wall calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: calf stretch with hands against wall
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step your right foot back, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight and your heel on the ground.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

name: donkey calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your toes on an elevated surface, such as a step or block.
Step:2 Place your hands on a stable support, such as a wall or railing, for balance.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith reverse calf raises
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar for support.
Step:5 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: single leg calf raise (on a dumbbell)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: dumbbell seated calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface such as a step or block, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold onto the dumbbell for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated squat calf raise on leg press machine
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the footplate, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the footplate, keeping your heels off the edge.
Step:4 Release the safety handles and push the footplate away from you by extending your knees.
Step:5 Once your knees are fully extended, slowly lower your heels by flexing your calves.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the footplate back up by extending your calves.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your right thigh.
Step:2 Extend your left leg straight out in front of you, keeping your foot flexed.
Step:3 Place the ball of your right foot on an elevated surface, such as a step or weight plate.
Step:4 Using your calf muscles, raise your right heel as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: lever donkey calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to the appropriate height for your body.
Step:2 Position yourself facing the machine, with your toes on the foot platform and your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or the support bars for stability.
Step:4 Engage your calves and lift your heels as high as possible, using the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: calf push stretch with hands against wall
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

name: smith toe raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to comfortably stand with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Position yourself under the bar with your shoulders directly below it and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform or weight plates, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: standing calves calf stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall or sturdy object, about an arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall or object at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step back with one foot, keeping your heel flat on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight.
Step:5 You should feel a stretch in your calf muscle.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:7 Repeat on the other leg.

name: assisted lying calves stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend one knee and place your foot flat on the ground.
Step:3 Using your hands or a towel, gently pull your toes towards your body, feeling a stretch in your calf.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat on the other leg.

name: one leg donkey calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place your hands on a stable surface for support, such as a wall or a bar.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground, keeping your knee slightly bent.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: bodyweight standing calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place your hands on a wall or stable surface for balance.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell seated calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step.
Step:3 Position the barbell across your thighs and hold it securely with your hands.
Step:4 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, lift your heels off the ground by extending your ankles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith standing leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to stand with your feet flat on the ground and your shoulders under the bar.
Step:2 Position yourself under the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place your hands on the bar for stability.
Step:4 Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: circles knee stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and lift your heels off the ground, balancing on the balls of your feet.
Step:3 Keeping your knees bent, rotate your knees in a circular motion, first clockwise and then counterclockwise.
Step:4 Perform the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

name: one leg floor calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place your hands on a wall or sturdy object for balance.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto the ball of your foot.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: standing calves
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, standing on your toes.
Step:3 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith one leg floor calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the floor under the smith machine bar, facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface, such as a weight plate or block.
Step:3 Position the smith machine bar across your lower legs, just above your ankles.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar with your hands for stability.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles, lifting your body up.
Step:6 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: sled 45в° calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your feet on the sled platform with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Push the sled platform away from you by extending your ankles and calves.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled platform back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ankle circles
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Lift one leg off the ground and rotate your ankle in a circular motion.
Step:3 Perform the desired number of circles in one direction, then switch to the other direction.
Step:4 Repeat with the other leg.

name: box jump down with one leg stabilization
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a box or platform with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and jump onto the box, landing softly with one foot on the box and the other foot hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Stabilize yourself on the box with the foot that is on it, while keeping the other foot off the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, engaging your calf muscles to maintain balance.
Step:5 Slowly step down with the foot that is on the box, returning to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the exercise with the other leg.

name: lever standing calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your height and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your shoulders under the pads and hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing one leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto the cable machine for support.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground and balance on the other leg.
Step:4 Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: band single leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your left foot.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly raise your left heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your left heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the right leg.

name: smith reverse calf raises
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar for support, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Step:2 Place your toes on the lower portion of the platform and position your knees under the lever pad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Press the lever pad down by extending your ankles, lifting your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: calf push stretch with hands against wall elite
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Switch legs and repeat the stretch. Focus on elite movement.

name: triple style sled one leg calf press on leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off.
Step:4 Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with triple intensity.

name: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - hammer grip deep
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle.
Step:4 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 (deep variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: targeted style single leg calf raise (on a dumbbell)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles. Emphasize targeted control.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

name: kettlebell double alternating hang clean
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebells to hang straight down in front of your body.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while shrugging your shoulders.
Step:5 As the kettlebells rise, pull them up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows high and out to the sides.
Step:6 Catch the kettlebells at shoulder height, with your palms facing inward and your elbows pointing forward.
Step:7 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable reverse one arm curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated inner biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated biceps curl to shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows close to your sides, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Once your forearms are vertical, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:5 Press the dumbbells overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell hammer curls (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, while holding your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: lever preacher curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arm extended over the edge of the bench, holding a dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbell back up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell peacher hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated revers grip concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: barbell standing close grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands close together.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez-barbell standing wide grip biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell zottman curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from your body.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your palms back to facing your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell kneeling bicep curl exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Kneel on the floor with an exercise ball in front of you.
Step:2 Place your elbows on top of the exercise ball, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell bicep curl with stork stance
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: dumbbell seated alternate hammer curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your palm facing your body.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:8 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm seated hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Step:3 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell waiter biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and keep your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the handles upward, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell over bench one arm neutral wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm extended over the bench, palm facing up.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your wrist in a neutral position.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: ez barbell close grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm concentration curl (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm extended down towards the floor.
Step:3 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

name: dumbbell alternating seated bicep curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the curl with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell lying preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended over the edge, holding a barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline inner biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the bench, allowing your elbows to hang down and your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm reverse spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by flexing your elbow.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: band one arm overhead biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place one end of the band under your foot.
Step:2 Hold the other end of the band with your arm fully extended overhead, palm facing forward.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl your forearm towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: cable overhead curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable pulldown bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and slowly curl the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever reverse grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm standing curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: cable one arm reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the lowest position.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Slowly curl your forearm towards your bicep, keeping your upper arm stationary against the pad.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

name: resistance band seated biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the resistance band up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the resistance band back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing pulldown (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your thighs, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the rope back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell reverse spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing one arm curl (over incline bench)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing forward.
Step:2 Place your other hand on an incline bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: lever hammer grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Place your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your chest is pressed against it.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a hammer grip (palms facing each other).
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell alternate biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place the arm blaster on your upper arms, ensuring a secure fit.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:8 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Place your upper arms on the pad and grip the handles with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows positioned on the pad.
Step:4 Exhale and curl your forearms towards your upper arms, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell biceps curl reverse
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell biceps curl squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your elbows close to your sides, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell biceps curl v sit on bosu ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bosu ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying supine biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated one arm bicep curl on exercise ball with leg raised
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended.
Step:3 Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Step:4 Slowly curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep.
Step:6 Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:8 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

name: dumbbell standing one arm curl over incline bench
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Place your other hand on an incline bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: barbell drag curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell up towards your chest by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell reverse grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Curl the barbell upwards by contracting your biceps, while exhaling.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold one end of the band in your hand and step on the other end with your foot on the same side.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 With your palm facing up, slowly curl your hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hand back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: dumbbell alternate biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

name: barbell standing reverse grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm seated bicep curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: ez barbell close-grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell standing wide grip biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable lying bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable reverse curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline curl
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the incline bench and let your elbows hang down, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell zottman preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and elbows resting on the pad.
Step:2 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary and your palms facing up.
Step:3 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing down.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing inner curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable close grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: bodyweight side lying biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm.
Step:2 Hold your upper arm against your side and bend your elbow to curl your forearm towards your shoulder.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing one arm concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Place your free hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: ez barbell reverse grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the pad, allowing your forearms to hang down.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm prone hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell lunge with bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.

Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Your right knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle and your left knee should be hovering just above the ground.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, simultaneously curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position, lowering the dumbbells back down to your sides.
Step:5 Repeat the lunge and bicep curl on the opposite side, stepping forward with your left foot.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell cross body hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells across your body towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and a dumbbell in one hand, resting your elbow on the inside of your thigh.
Step:2 Fully extend your arm and hold the dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: cable squatting curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to the lowest setting on a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and knees behind your toes.
Step:5 As you squat down, curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the curl, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell seated close-grip concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms against your inner thighs, just above your knees, and let the barbell hang down in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable rope one arm hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:4 Position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:5 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Slowly curl the rope handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:7 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the rope handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: cable lying close-grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar towards your chest by contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell prone incline curl
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:7 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:8 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted seated bicep curl (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a medicine ball with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and let your arms hang down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the medicine ball up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the medicine ball back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable one arm curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell prone incline hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Allow your arms to hang straight down towards the floor, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell standing concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your opposite hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: cable reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, with your palms facing down and your elbows fully extended.
Step:3 Grab the cable handles with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: olympic barbell hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold an Olympic barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended straight down.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying supine curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable overhead curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold the cable handle with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:3 Slowly curl the cable down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell alternate hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated overhead curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
