Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm prone curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Extend your arm fully, letting it hang straight down towards the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: cable drag curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable two arm curl on incline bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell standing wide-grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing away from your body.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell hammer curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable one arm preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher curl pad.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Slowly curl the cable handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm against the pad.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

name: dumbbell incline curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm standing hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted standing curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights up to shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: biceps pull-up
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull yourself up by bending your elbows, bringing your chest towards the bar.
Step:3 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell alternate biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the barbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

name: barbell preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated one arm concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle with one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while exhaling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell standing inner biceps curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 While holding your upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position as your breathe in.
Step:7 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying wide curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated neutral wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your wrists in a neutral position, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell alternate preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the pad of the preacher bench, allowing your arms to fully extend.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand as you contract your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to curl the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell step up single leg balance with bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground.
Step:6 Repeat the movement on the opposite side, stepping up with your left foot and curling the dumbbells.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell bicep curl lunge with bowling motion
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, bending your right knee and lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 At the bottom of the lunge, rotate your torso to the right, as if you were bowling a ball.
Step:5 Reverse the motion, stepping back with your right foot and returning to the starting position while lowering the dumbbells back down.
Step:6 Repeat the lunge and curl motion, this time rotating your torso to the left.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell prone incline curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Exhale as you curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell preacher curl over exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: cable rope hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Step:4 Position your upper arms against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the rope towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the rope back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing one arm reverse curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arm fully extended and close to your body, with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: biceps leg concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 With your palm facing up, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell hammer curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: cable preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the cable attachment with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows tucked in at your sides.
Step:4 Slowly curl the cable attachment up towards your shoulders, squeezing your biceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell revers grip biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell bottoms up clean from the hang position
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebell to hang down between your legs, with your arm fully extended.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while pulling the kettlebell up towards your shoulder.
Step:5 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist so that the bottom of the kettlebell is facing up.
Step:6 Catch the kettlebell at shoulder height with your elbow bent and your palm facing up.
Step:7 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: dumbbell standing zottman preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the preacher bench and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing downward.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as well.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you contract your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to curl the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your arm fully extended and palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Place your opposite hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell standing reverse curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.

Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your back against the bench and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 While keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell reverse curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the barbell upward, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell over bench neutral wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated biceps curl (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and rest your elbow against the inside of your thigh.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: band alternating biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your sides and slowly curl one arm up towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps at the top.
Step:3 Lower the arm back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:4 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez-bar biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping them stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows close to your body, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing alternate hammer curl and press
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your back straight.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the curl with your left hand.
Step:7 After completing the curl with your left hand, exhale and press the dumbbell in your right hand overhead.
Step:8 Extend your arm fully and hold for a moment at the top.
Step:9 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:10 Repeat the press with your left hand.
Step:11 Continue alternating between curls and presses for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your upper arm resting on the pad.
Step:2 Hold the dumbbell with a neutral grip (palms facing your body).
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: barbell curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell bicep curl on exercise ball with leg raised
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 While performing the bicep curl, raise one leg off the ground and hold it in the air for the duration of the exercise.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: dumbbell seated preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your upper arm against the preacher pad.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell alternate seated hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended down.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez bar seated close grip concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold an EZ barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell alternating bicep curl with leg raised on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place an exercise ball behind you and position one foot on top of it, keeping your balance.
Step:3 With your arms fully extended and elbows close to your sides, curl one dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell seated curls
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the ez barbell to hang down in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the ez barbell upwards towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm zottman preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your upper arm on the preacher bench pad, allowing your arm to fully extend.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrist so that your palm faces up.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position, rotating your wrist back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: biceps narrow pull-ups
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull yourself up towards the bar, focusing on using your biceps to lift your body.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell cross body hammer curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells as close to your opposite shoulder as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable hammer curl (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:2 Hold the cable rope attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing each other, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the cable rope attachment until your biceps are fully contracted and the rope is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the cable rope attachment back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith machine bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell high curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and curl the dumbbells as high as possible while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell close grip preacher curl - precision variation
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize precision control.

name: cable concentration curl tempo
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and rest your elbow against the inside of your thigh. Focus on tempo movement.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: barbell reverse preacher curl inclined
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Perform with inclined intensity.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever reverse grip preacher curl with precision
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended. Maintain precision form throughout.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell prone incline curl with intensive
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:7 (intensive variation) Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:8 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell standing reverse grip curl resistance
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on resistance movement.

name: dumbbell step up single leg balance with bicep curl - chair variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground.
Step:6 (chair variation) Repeat the movement on the opposite side, stepping up with your left foot and curling the dumbbells.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hold style dumbbell alternating seated bicep curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder.
Step:4 (hold variation) Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the curl with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.

name: intermediate style dumbbell preacher curl over exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball.
Step:3 (intermediate variation) Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell one arm prone hammer curl - macro variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms. Focus on macro movement.

name: dumbbell hammer curl with traditional
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions. Focus on traditional movement.

name: side plank hip adduction
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Step:4 While maintaining the side plank position, lift your top leg towards the ceiling, keeping it straight.
Step:5 Slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: assisted side lying adductor stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Bend your bottom leg slightly for stability.
Step:3 Place your top foot on a stable surface, such as a bench or step.
Step:4 Keeping your top leg straight, slowly lower it towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your inner thigh.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.

name: lever seated hip adduction
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your feet on the footrests and grasp the handles for stability.
Step:3 Engage your adductor muscles and slowly bring your legs together, squeezing your inner thighs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: side lying hip adduction (male)
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your bottom arm under your head for support.
Step:3 Engage your adductors and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: butterfly yoga pose
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and bring the soles of your feet together, allowing your knees to fall out to the sides.
Step:3 Hold onto your ankles or feet with your hands.
Step:4 Sit up tall and lengthen your spine.
Step:5 Gently press your knees down towards the floor, feeling a stretch in your inner thighs.
Step:6 Hold this position for a few breaths.
Step:7 To release, slowly bring your knees back up and extend your legs.

name: cable hip adduction
instructions: Step:1 Attach the ankle cuff to your ankle and stand facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Position yourself far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Place your hands on the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your leg straight, slowly move your leg across your body towards the midline.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell press sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on a mat with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell side bend
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, letting it hang down by your side.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend sideways at the waist towards the opposite side of the dumbbell, lowering the weight as far as you comfortably can.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat.

name: sledge hammer
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the sledge hammer with both hands.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Swing the sledge hammer down towards the ground, using your core and upper body strength.
Step:4 As you swing down, pivot your hips and transfer the force to the hammer.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band standing crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the band with both hands and bring it up to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated crunch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it behind your head.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing lift
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it at waist height.
Step:3 Engage your core and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the cable handle up towards your opposite shoulder, rotating your torso.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: bottoms-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your hips off the ground, bringing your knees towards your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted front plank
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the floor.
Step:2 Place your forearms on the ground, with your elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:3 Extend your legs straight out behind you, with your toes on the ground.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift your body off the ground, balancing on your forearms and toes.
Step:5 Keep your body in a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:6 Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Step:7 Lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: assisted hanging knee raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core muscles and lift your knees towards your chest, bending at the hips and knees.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs.
Step:4 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a weight plate or dumbbell on your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your shoulder blades are off the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: tuck crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest, simultaneously curling your upper body towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulder blades and extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: bodyweight incline side plank
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Step:4 Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Step:5 Lower your hips back down to the ground and repeat on the other side.

name: assisted prone rectus femoris stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your legs straight.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and reach back with your right hand to grab your right foot or ankle.
Step:3 Gently pull your right foot or ankle towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in the front of your right thigh.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release and repeat on the other side.

name: kettlebell double windmill
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand.
Step:2 Extend your right arm overhead, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:3 Rotate your left foot 45 degrees to the left and your right foot 90 degrees to the right.
Step:4 Bend at the waist to the left, keeping your right arm extended overhead.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, reaching towards your left foot.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your right foot to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: lever seated crunch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or place your hands on the side pads for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the pad to move with you.
Step:4 Once your upper body is at a 45-degree angle, contract your abs and crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band horizontal pallof press
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Stand perpendicular to the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the band handle with both hands and step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band.
Step:4 Bring your hands to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body.
Step:5 Engage your core and maintain a stable stance.
Step:6 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, pushing the band away from your body.
Step:7 Hold the extended position for a few seconds, focusing on maintaining tension in your core.
Step:8 Slowly bring your hands back to your chest, resisting the pull of the band.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: pelvic tilt
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your abs and tilt your pelvis upward, pressing your lower back into the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your abs.
Step:5 Release the tilt and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: reverse crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended along your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs perpendicular to the floor.
Step:3 Contract your abs and curl your hips off the floor, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: assisted hanging knee raise with throw down
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, keeping your legs together.
Step:3 Once your knees are at chest level, explosively throw your legs down towards the ground, extending them fully.
Step:4 Allow your legs to swing back up and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

name: full maltese
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight out to the sides.
Step:2 Slowly lean forward, keeping your arms straight, until your upper body is parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Engage your core and hold this position for a few seconds.
Step:4 Return to the starting position by pushing through your feet and standing back up.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: assisted lying leg raise with lateral throw down
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 While keeping your legs together, lower them to one side until they are a few inches above the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then lift your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement to the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: vertical leg raise (on parallel bars)
instructions: Step:1 Hang from the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: side-to-side toe touch (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides.
Step:2 Bend at the waist to the right, reaching your right hand towards your right foot while keeping your left hand extended to the side.
Step:3 Return to the starting position and then bend at the waist to the left, reaching your left hand towards your left foot while keeping your right hand extended to the side.
Step:4 Repeat the side-to-side bending motion for the desired number of repetitions.

name: assisted lying leg raise with throw down
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Raise your legs until they are perpendicular to the ground.
Step:5 Lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Simultaneously, throw your legs down towards the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:7 Raise your legs back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: wind sprints
instructions: Step:1 Find an open space or a track to perform the exercise.
Step:2 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Begin running as fast as you can, pumping your arms and driving your knees up.
Step:4 Continue sprinting for a specific distance or time period.
Step:5 Rest and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable twist (up-down)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the rotation to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable kneeling crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the rope handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:3 Keeping your hips stationary, flex your waist and crunch your torso down towards your thighs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable side bend
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: roller body saw
instructions: Step:1 Start in a plank position with your forearms on the roller and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly roll the roller forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the roller back towards your starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: jackknife sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms overhead.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell standing ab rollerout
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly roll the barbell down towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your arms extended.
Step:3 Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your hands are directly above your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your thighs, maintaining control and keeping your core engaged.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted overhead crunch (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms overhead.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly curl your torso forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your torso back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: standing wheel rollerout
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing tall with your feet shoulder-width apart and the wheel roller in front of you.
Step:2 Bend at your waist and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Continue rolling forward until you feel a stretch in your abs and your body is extended as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your body, returning to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band bicycle crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your hands behind your head and your knees bent.
Step:2 Lift your feet off the ground and bring your right knee towards your chest while simultaneously twisting your torso to bring your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:3 Straighten your right leg while bringing your left knee towards your chest and twisting your torso to bring your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 Continue alternating the twisting motion, as if you are pedaling a bicycle, while keeping your core engaged throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: potty squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if you were sitting on a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lying elbow to knee
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 At the same time, extend your right leg straight out and lift it off the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and extending your left leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable reverse crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down facing up on a mat.
Step:2 Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your thighs towards your chest.
Step:4 While keeping your upper body stable, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the mat.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lean planche
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders past your hands.
Step:3 Keep your elbows slightly bent and your body straight as you lean forward.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell windmill
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand overhead.
Step:2 Rotate your left foot outwards about 45 degrees and keep your right foot pointing forward.
Step:3 Bend your torso to the left side, keeping your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:4 Lower your torso as far as you can while keeping your right arm straight and your left arm extended to the side.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by pushing through your right foot and engaging your obliques.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: straddle maltese
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pair of rings with your arms fully extended and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Spread your legs wide apart, forming a straddle position.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lower your body until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: butt-ups
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, squeeze your abs and pause for a moment.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: full planche
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, lifting your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Continue shifting your weight forward until your body is parallel to the ground, balancing on your hands.
Step:4 Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line.
Step:5 Slowly lower your feet back to the ground and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cocoons
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: side hip (on parallel bars)
instructions: Step:1 Stand between two parallel bars with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bars and lift your body off the ground, supporting your weight on your arms.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly lift your legs to the side, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: alternate heel touchers
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your shoulders off the ground and reach your right hand towards your right heel.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat on the left side, reaching your left hand towards your left heel.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable tuck reverse crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down on a mat facing up.
Step:2 Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 At the same time, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted decline sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a decline bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward until your torso is perpendicular to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: flexion leg sit up (bent knee)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 At the same time, lift your legs off the ground, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated crunch v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the seat for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs.
Step:5 Slowly return to the starting position, allowing your back to round slightly.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: twisted leg raise (female)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, bringing them towards your chest.
Step:3 As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your knees towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted seated twist (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands close to your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: flag
instructions: Step:1 Start by gripping a vertical pole with both hands, palms facing each other, and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Using your core and upper body strength, raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell rollerout from bench
instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the floor with a barbell placed on a bench in front of you.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly roll the barbell forward, extending your arms in front of you.
Step:4 Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your body, returning to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: crunch (hands overhead)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight above your head.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: side bridge v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Step:4 Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Step:5 Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side.

name: otis up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: frog planche
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 As you lower your body, lift your feet off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then extend your legs back out and push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: suspended reverse crunch
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees up towards your chest, curling your pelvis towards your ribcage.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inchworm
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then walk your hands back towards your feet, keeping your legs as straight as possible.
Step:5 Once your hands reach your feet, stand back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band v-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engaging your abs, lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: bridge - mountain climber (cross body)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your right foot off the ground, bringing your right knee towards your left elbow.
Step:3 Return your right foot to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left foot towards your right elbow.
