Step:4 Continue alternating sides, moving at a controlled pace.
Step:5 Keep your hips level and avoid lifting your hips too high or sagging them too low.
Step:6 Maintain a steady breathing pattern throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: crunch (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso forward.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band alternating v-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other.
Step:4 Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: sit-up with arms on chest
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated leg raise crunch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly raise your legs up towards your chest, curling your torso forward at the same time.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and torso back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: prone twist on stability ball
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes touching the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Rotate your torso to one side, bringing your shoulder towards your hip. Keep your hips and legs stable throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: air bike
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your hands placed behind your head.
Step:2 Lift your legs off the ground and bend your knees at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Bring your right elbow towards your left knee while simultaneously straightening your right leg.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat the movement on the opposite side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee while straightening your left leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides in a pedaling motion for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band standing twisting crunch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper back, crossing it in front of your chest.
Step:2 Hold the ends of the band with your hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides.
Step:3 Engage your abs and twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: sit-up v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hip raise (bent knee)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and glutes, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: leg pull in flat bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable russian twists (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Twist your torso to the right, bringing the cable handle towards your right hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the cable handle towards your left hip.
Step:6 Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging oblique knee raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dead bug
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended towards the ceiling.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, creating a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower back to press your lower back into the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower your right arm and left leg towards the ground, keeping them straight and hovering just above the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm and right leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: v-sit on floor
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Lean back slightly and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Simultaneously, lift your upper body off the ground and reach your arms towards your legs.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band kneeling twisting crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Step:2 Kneel down facing away from the anchor point and hold the band with both hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, bringing your hands towards your opposite hip.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: spine twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the twist to the left side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: l-sit on floor
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the floor beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Try to bring your legs parallel to the floor, forming an 'L' shape with your body.
Step:5 Hold this position for as long as you can.
Step:6 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: one arm slam (with medicine ball)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball with one hand in front of your waist.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise the medicine ball above your head, fully extending your arm.
Step:4 Forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground, using your core and shoulders to generate power.
Step:5 Catch the medicine ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging straight leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: assisted sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or have someone hold your feet down.
Step:2 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:4 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: crab twist toe touch
instructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Place your hands behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet, and lift your hips off the ground.
Step:3 Extend one leg straight out in front of you while simultaneously reaching your opposite hand towards your toes.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: knee touch crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and reach your right hand towards your left knee.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat, this time reaching your left hand towards your right knee.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable side crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand sideways to the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with the hand furthest from the machine and place your other hand on your hip.
Step:3 Keep your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 With your abs engaged, bend sideways at the waist, bringing your elbow down towards your hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: stability ball crunch (full range hands behind head)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band jack knife sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, bringing your hands towards your feet.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: incline twisting sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward.
Step:5 As you curl up, twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your torso to the other side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell bent press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and press the kettlebell overhead with your right arm, keeping your elbow locked.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the left, shifting your weight onto your left foot.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lower your torso towards the ground, keeping your right arm extended overhead.
Step:5 As you lower, keep your eyes on the kettlebell and your chest lifted.
Step:6 Once your left hand touches the ground, push through your left foot and straighten your left leg, driving your hips forward.
Step:7 As you drive your hips forward, use your core and right arm to press the kettlebell back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: cable seated twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged, slowly rotate your torso to one side, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the range of motion, then slowly rotate back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: front plank with twist
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:2 Engage your core and glutes to maintain a stable position.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the right, lifting your right arm and extending it towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Keep your hips and legs stable as you twist.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the twist on the left side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: crunch (on stability ball, arms straight)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ball, curling your shoulders towards your hips.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: 45° side bend
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight down by your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend your torso to one side, lowering your hand towards your knee.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable judo flip
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder.
Step:6 Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center.
Step:7 Repeat the movement on the opposite side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the smith machine with your back against the pad and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the barbell, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and glutes, then push through your heels to raise your hips off the ground.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:5 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: curl-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell seated twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly rotate back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: landmine 180
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and rotate your torso to the right, swinging the barbell down towards your right hip.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and rotate your torso to the left, swinging the barbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder.
Step:4 Continue this twisting motion, alternating sides, for the desired number of repetitions.

name: pull-in (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the stability ball for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly roll your hips forward, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: suspended abdominal fallout
instructions: Step:1 Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: arm slingers hanging bent knee legs
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, bringing them as close to your elbows as possible.
Step:3 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band vertical pallof press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band.
Step:3 Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height.
Step:5 Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly bring the band back towards your chest.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: weighted russian twist (legs up)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet lifted off the ground, keeping your legs together.
Step:2 Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles.
Step:4 Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the ground on your right side.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the ground on your left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: wheel rollerout
instructions: Step:1 Kneel on the floor and place the wheel roller in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles of the wheel roller and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your abs tight.
Step:4 Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees, maintaining control and keeping your abs engaged.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: power point plank
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your glutes to maintain a stable position.
Step:3 Lower your body down onto your forearms, one arm at a time, maintaining a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Hold this position for the desired amount of time, keeping your core and glutes engaged.
Step:5 To return to the starting position, push through your forearms and lift your body back up into a high plank position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lunge with twist
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge, twist your torso to the right, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping forward with your left foot and twisting your torso to the left.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: groin crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: seated side crunch (wall)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your back against a wall and your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lean to one side, bringing your elbow towards your hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: prisoner half sit-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: roller reverse crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended straight above your head and your legs straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place the roller between your feet and grip it with your toes.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground and curl your knees towards your chest, rolling the roller towards your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position, rolling the roller away from your body.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: spell caster
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the waist, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell towards the opposite foot, rotating your torso as you do so.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: seated leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, slowly raise them up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band assisted wheel rollerout
instructions: Step:1 Kneel on the floor and hold the handles of the band with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Place the band on the ground in front of you and position your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly roll the wheel forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: gorilla chin
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:4 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, bringing your chin above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: assisted motion russian twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold the medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, engaging your abs and keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the medicine ball towards the right side of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the medicine ball towards the left side of your body.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band push sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point.
Step:2 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band seated twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight.
Step:2 Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lying leg-hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: janda sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: crunch floor
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulders off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: decline sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: front lever
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Step:3 Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest.
Step:4 Simultaneously, lift your legs up and extend them straight out in front of you, keeping your body parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for a full front lever position.
Step:6 To release, slowly lower your legs back down and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: reverse plank with leg lift
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your hands resting on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet.
Step:2 Press through your hands and lift your hips off the ground, coming into a reverse plank position.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift one leg off the ground, extending it straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Hold for a moment, then lower your leg back down.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: posterior step to overhead reach
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Take a step back with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position.
Step:4 As you lower into the lunge, simultaneously reach your arms overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then return to the starting position by pushing through your left heel and bringing your right foot forward.
Step:6 Repeat the movement on the other side, stepping back with your left foot and bending your right knee.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable twist
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and twist your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling the contraction in your abs and obliques.
Step:5 Slowly return to the starting position, resisting the cable's pull.
Step:6 Repeat the movement to the left side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band lying straight leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your feet together.
Step:2 Place the band around the arches of your feet and hold the ends of the band with your hands.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift both legs off the ground until they are perpendicular to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted side bend (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a weight in one hand and place your other hand on your hip.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the weighted side, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: barbell rollerout
instructions: Step:1 Kneel on the floor and hold a barbell with both hands, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Roll the barbell forward, extending your arms and keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your knees, maintaining control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up to side plank
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position.
Step:4 Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted hanging leg-hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: decline crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: oblique crunches floor
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the floor, rotating your torso to one side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the floor.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, alternating sides with each repetition.

name: barbell side bent v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Slowly bend your torso to the right side, lowering the barbell towards your right knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement on the left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging straight leg hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lying leg raise flat bench
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a flat bench with your back pressed against it.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Keep your legs straight and together, and lift them up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell sitted alternate leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping the other leg on the ground.
Step:3 Lower the raised leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Step:4 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: half sit-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging leg hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up by flexing your hips and knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: shoulder tap
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your right hand off the ground, reaching across to tap your left shoulder.
Step:3 Place your right hand back on the ground and repeat with your left hand tapping your right shoulder.
Step:4 Continue alternating shoulder taps while keeping your hips and torso stable.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: negative crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: 3/4 sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: flexion leg sit up (straight arm)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and arms straight above your head.
Step:2 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground while simultaneously lifting your legs towards your chest.
Step:3 Reach your hands towards your toes as you lift your upper body and legs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted russian twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a weight or medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your right side.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: arm slingers hanging straight legs
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight down.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell standing twist
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Slowly twist your torso to the right, pivoting on your feet and hips, while keeping your lower body stable.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever kneeling twist
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees resting on the pads and your upper body facing forward.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged, twist your torso to one side as far as comfortably possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: incline leg hip raise (leg straight)
instructions: Step:1 Lie on an incline bench with your back flat against the bench and your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the bench, raising them as high as you can while keeping them straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: captains chair straight leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the captain's chair with your back against the backrest and your forearms resting on the arm pads.
Step:2 Keep your upper body stable and your back straight.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging straight twisting leg hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated crunch (chest pad)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and chest pad position according to your comfort.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the chest pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or side bars for stability.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the chest pad to move with you.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the maximum contraction, feeling the tension in your abs.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by contracting your abs and pulling yourself back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: oblique crunch v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the ground, rotating your torso to one side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: frog crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell sitted alternate leg raise (female)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Step:2 Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Lower the leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging pike
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: elbow-to-knee
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 At the same time, bring your left knee towards your right elbow, creating a twisting motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and your right knee towards your left elbow.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: weighted russian twist v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:3 Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles.
Step:4 Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the right side of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the left side of your body.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: twisted leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable side bend crunch (bosu ball)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a cable handle in one hand.
Step:2 Place the other hand on your hip.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the hand holding the cable, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: cable standing crunch (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell advanced windmill
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in your right hand, with your arm extended overhead and your palm facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your left foot slightly to the right, and shift your weight onto your left leg.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and hinge at the hip, lowering your torso towards the left side.
Step:5 Keep your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:6 As you lower your torso, allow your right leg to straighten and your right foot to pivot slightly.
Step:7 Lower your torso until you feel a stretch in your left hamstring and your right arm is pointing towards the ground.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: quarter sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inchworm v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Keeping your legs straight, walk your feet towards your hands, bringing your hips up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Continue walking your hands forward, repeating the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kneeling plank tap shoulder (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: straddle planche
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet spread wide apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders over your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: kettlebell figure 8
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Pass the kettlebell between your legs, switching hands as it reaches the back of your legs.
Step:4 As the kettlebell comes forward, pass it to the other hand between your legs.
Step:5 Continue passing the kettlebell between your legs in a figure 8 motion.
Step:6 Maintain a steady pace and engage your core throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cross body crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground and twist to bring your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: russian twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Hold your hands together in front of your chest or hold a weight if desired.
Step:4 Lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your sit bones.
Step:5 Twist your torso to the right, bringing your hands or weight towards the right side of your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing your hands or weight towards the left side of your body.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: arms overhead full sit-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your arms overhead, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is upright.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable kneeling crunch - gentle variation
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the rope handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:3 Keeping your hips stationary, flex your waist and crunch your torso down towards your thighs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Maintain gentle form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band alternating v-up with simple
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other. Focus on simple movement.
Step:4 Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging pike with intense
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 (intense variation) Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: blunt cable standing crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Emphasize blunt control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: slow leg pull in flat bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain slow form throughout.

name: suspended abdominal fallout - inclined variation
instructions: Step:1 Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you. Maintain inclined form throughout.
Step:3 Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: narrow style band jack knife sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, bringing your hands towards your feet.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Focus on narrow movement.

name: single style cable standing crunch (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Focus on single movement.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: rough band push sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point.
Step:2 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Focus on rough movement.
Step:4 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable side bend smooth
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Focus on smooth movement.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cocoons with mega
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize mega control.

name: rounded twisted leg raise (female)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, bringing them towards your chest. Emphasize rounded control.
Step:3 As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your knees towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging pike weak
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground. Emphasize weak control.
Step:4 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable judo flip with static
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally. Emphasize static control.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder.
Step:6 Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center.
Step:7 Repeat the movement on the opposite side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lying leg-hip raise - contracted variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Emphasize contracted control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: barbell sitted alternate leg raise (female) with intermediate
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Step:2 (intermediate variation) Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Lower the leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up to side plank - athletic variation
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position. Emphasize athletic control.
Step:4 Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band seated twist pure
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight.
Step:2 Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 (pure variation) Repeat the twist to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging straight leg raise with elevated
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go. Maintain elevated form throughout.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hanging straight twisting leg hip raise with compound
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight. Perform with compound intensity.
Step:3 Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: sit-up with arms on chest with mini
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Maintain mini form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: intermediate style kneeling plank tap shoulder (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position.
Step:3 (intermediate variation) Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: supine style band alternating v-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Step:2 Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Step:3 As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other. Focus on supine movement.
Step:4 Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: gentle prone twist on stability ball
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes touching the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Rotate your torso to one side, bringing your shoulder towards your hip. Keep your hips and legs stable throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 (gentle variation) Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: band vertical pallof press - seated variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band.
Step:3 Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height.
Step:5 Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly bring the band back towards your chest.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides. Perform with seated intensity.

name: firm style hanging oblique knee raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize firm control.

name: lever seated hip abduction
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Step:3 Place your hands on the side handles for stability.
Step:4 Engage your abductors and slowly push your legs apart, away from the midline of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your legs back together to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: resistance band seated hip abduction
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support.
Step:4 Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: side bridge hip abduction
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Step:4 While keeping your core engaged, lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your leg back down.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: side hip abduction
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Step:2 Shift your weight to one leg and lift the opposite leg out to the side, keeping it straight.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: straight leg outer hip abductor
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your bottom arm under your head for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: fast style resistance band seated hip abduction
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support.
Step:4 (fast variation) Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
